code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import Header from"../app/header/Header";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Dashboard=()=>{const[isMounted,setIsMounted]=useState(false);const[showSideBar,setShowSideBar]=useState(false);const[canRenderGoogleAuth,setCanRenderGoogleAuth]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{setIsMounted(true);if(typeof window==="undefined")return;if(window.screen.width>=768){setShowSideBar(true);}const profile=window.sessionStorage.getItem("user-profile");if(profile==null){setCanRenderGoogleAuth(true);}},[]);if(!isMounted)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"wrapper",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Header,{showSideBar:()=>setShowSideBar(!showSideBar)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"dashboard-container",children:"Dashboard"})]});};export default Dashboard;
